7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Constructor Parameters"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":"The only runtime parameters are passed directly to the constructor:"}]
9:["$","$L2a",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"my-agent\",        # Scope working memories to this session\n  data_dir=\"./my-data\",         # Custom data directory (optional)\n  bank=\"work\",                  # Named memory bank (optional)\n  author_id=\"alice\",            # Multi-agent identity (v2.1)\n  author_type=\"human\",          # \"human\", \"agent\", or \"system\" (v2.1)\n  channel_id=\"team-slack\",      # Cross-session channel (v2.1)\n)","language":"python"}]

d:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_DATA_DIR"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Root data directory for database files"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX_ITEMS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"10000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum items in Working Memory"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_TTL_HOURS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"24"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Time-to-live for Working Memory entries (hours)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EP_LIMIT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"50000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum items in Episodic Memory"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SLEEP_BATCH"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"5000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Number of items to process per sleep cycle"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SP_MAX"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"1000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum scratchpad entries"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_RECENCY_HALFLIFE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"168.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recency decay half-life in hours (default = 1 week)"}]]}]]}]]}]

10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Tiered Degradation (v2.3)"}]
11:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_DAYS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"30"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Days before Tier 1 memories degrade to Tier 2 (LLM-compressed)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_DAYS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"180"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Days before Tier 2 memories degrade to Tier 3 (entity-extracted signal)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER1_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"1.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall score multiplier for fresh Tier 1 memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall score multiplier for compressed Tier 2 memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.25"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall score multiplier for cold Tier 3 memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_DEGRADE_BATCH"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"100"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum memories to process per degradation cycle"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SMART_COMPRESS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"1"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable entity-aware sentence extraction for Tier 3 (0 or 1)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_MAX_CHARS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"300"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum characters for Tier 3 signal extraction"}]]}]]}]]}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Veracity / Memory Confidence (v2.3)"}]
13:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_STATED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"1.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for explicitly-stated memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_INFERRED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.7"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for AI-inferred memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TOOL_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for tool-generated memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_IMPORTED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.6"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for cross-provider imported memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_UNKNOWN_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for legacy/uncategorized memories"}]]}]]}]]}]
14:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Embeddings"}]
15:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via fastembed (384 dimensions) for local embedding generation. No external API key is needed."]}]
16:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Vector quantization type (e.g. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"float32"}],")"]}]]}]}]]}]
17:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Local LLM (for Sleep Summarization)"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":"The sleep cycle can use a local LLM to summarize grouped working memories before promoting them to episodic memory."}]
19:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_ENABLED"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable/disable LLM-based summarization"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_MAX_TOKENS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"256"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum tokens for generated summaries"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_N_THREADS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"4"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Number of CPU threads for inference"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_N_CTX"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"2048"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Context window size for the local model"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_REPO"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hugging Face repository for the local LLM"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_FILE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"GGUF model filename within the repo"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"External OpenAI-compatible API base URL (alternative to local LLM)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_API_KEY"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"API key for the external LLM endpoint"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_MODEL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Model name for the external LLM endpoint"}]]}]]}]]}]
1a:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2b",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"No External Dependencies Required"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne runs entirely locally. Embeddings use fastembed with ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," (384 dims), and the sleep cycle uses a local LLM via llamafile or an optional external OpenAI-compatible endpoint. No OpenAI API key is required for basic usage."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
1b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Configuration File (config.yaml)"}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":["In addition to environment variables, Mnemosyne can be configured via a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"config.yaml"}]," file. This is the recommended approach for Hermes plugin deployments and multi-bank setups."]}]
1d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Location"}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne looks for configuration in this order (first found wins):"}]
1f:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"./config.yaml"}]," (current working directory)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/config.yaml"}]," (user-level)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Environment variables (fallback for any setting not in config.yaml)"}],"\n"]}]
20:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Schema"}]
2c:T5c4,# mnemosyne config.yaml
memory:
mnemosyne:
  # Storage
  data_dir: ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data
  db_path: ./memory.db

  # Auto-sleep consolidation
  auto_sleep: true              # Enable background consolidation thread
  sleep_threshold: 5000         # Min Working Memory entries before auto-sleep triggers

  # Vector configuration
  vector_type: int8             # Quantization: int8, float32, or binary
  embedding_model: BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5

  # Memory tiers
  wm_max_items: 10000           # Max Working Memory entries
  wm_ttl_hours: 24              # TTL for Working Memory entries
  ep_limit: 50000               # Max Episodic Memory entries
  sp_max: 1000                  # Max scratchpad entries

  # Sleep consolidation
  sleep_batch: 5000             # Items per sleep cycle
  recency_halflife: 168.0       # Recency decay half-life (hours)

  # Tiered degradation (v2.3)
  tier2_days: 30                # Days before Tier 1 → Tier 2
  tier3_days: 180               # Days before Tier 2 → Tier 3
  smart_compress: true          # Entity-aware sentence extraction for Tier 3

  # Pattern filtering
  ignore_patterns:              # Content patterns to skip during remember
    - "be ACTIVE"                # Skill refinement boilerplate
    - "nothing to change"        # No-op responses
    - "skill.*refined"           # Wildcard match

  # Local LLM (for sleep summarization)
  llm:
    enabled: true
    max_tokens: 256
    n_threads: 4
    n_ctx: 2048
21:["$","$L2a",null,{"code":"$2c","language":"yaml"}]
22:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Precedence"}]
23:["$","p",null,{"children":["Settings merge with this priority: ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"config.yaml"}]," > ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"environment variables"}]," > ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"defaults"}],". Any setting left unset in config.yaml falls back to the corresponding environment variable, then to the built-in default."]}]
24:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0a4uvox5u-8r1.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]
25:["$","$L2d",null,{"children":["$","$2e",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@2f"}]}]
30:[]
26:"$W30"
27:["$","$1","h",{"children":[null,["$","$L31",null,{"children":"$L32"}],["$","div",null,{"hidden":true,"children":["$","$L33",null,{"children":["$","$2e",null,{"name":"Next.Metadata","children":"$L34"}]}]}],["$","meta",null,{"name":"next-size-adjust","content":""}]]}]
29:["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/0~u_-sly~1qle.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}]

32:[["$","meta","0",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}]]
36:I[72,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"IconMark"]
